subheadline: Every Desiderio preset carries light and dark surfaces in one OKLCH token set, so all 255 elements switch with the visitor's color scheme — WCAG 2.2-checked contrast included, forgotten corners not. This is the Midnight preset doing exactly that.

background_image.title: Desiderio pricing page in the dark Midnight preset
background_image.alternative: Rendered Desiderio pricing page in the dark Midnight theme preset.
background_image.description: Screenshot of a live Desiderio frontend page in dark mode.
